title: cytisus ardoinoi
intro: Cytisus ardoinoi, also known as French broom or Scotch broom, is a flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cytisus ardoinoi include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for herbal remedies, and it's also used in some traditional folk medicine practices.
